title: verilator generates incorrect C++ code when genvar is used incorrectly

features.name: genvar used outside generate block in port connection
features.description: Code should include a genvar declaration outside a generate block used in module-level port connection expressions

features.name: genvar used in slice part-select outside generate
features.description: Code should include a genvar used in a part-select slice operation (+:) outside a generate block at module scope
